tasks.instruction: Complete each sentence with one word. The dashes show you the missing letters.

items.stem: It's cold outside, so put on your _ _ a _ _ and wrap it around your neck.
My hands are freezing — I forgot to bring my _ _ o _ _ _ today.
Grandma knitted me a warm wool _ _ e _ _ _ _ for my birthday.
I always wear my _ _ a _ _ _ _ _ when we have PE at school because they are comfortable.
I changed into my _ _ j _ _ _ _ and brushed my teeth before going to bed.
Don't forget to take a _ _ c _ _ _ in case it gets chilly in the evening.
